g.text: Exactly one bit set per frame.
aux field (uint32, reinterpreted as int32 for status):
POD structs only — fixed-size fields packed sequentially. No alignment padding, no pointers, no std::string.
Arrays: T[N] written as N contiguous elements. Strings: char[N+1] null-terminated, fixed size on wire.
writeFrame() writes header + payload atomically to the SPSC ring (all-or-nothing, no partial writes).
readFrame() reads header first, validates payloadBytes, then reads payload. Returns IPC_ERR_RING_FULL if ring has no space.
